'''lofaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:elastocapillary|elastocapillary]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-f-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:elastocapillary|elastocapillary]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lofaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lofarithi|lofarithi]] || [[word:lofariji|lofariji]] || [[word:lofarishi|lofarishi]] || [[word:lofariki|lofariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lofaruthuthu|lofaruthuthu]] || [[word:lofarujuju|lofarujuju]] || [[word:lofarushushu|lofarushushu]] || [[word:lofarukuku|lofarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lofaruthu|lofaruthu]] || [[word:lofaruju|lofaruju]] || [[word:lofarushu|lofarushu]] || [[word:lofaruku|lofaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lofarufthuf|lofarufthuf]] || [[word:lofarufjuf|lofarufjuf]] || [[word:lofarufshuf|lofarufshuf]] || [[word:lofarufkuf|lofarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lofarethe|lofarethe]] || [[word:lofareje|lofareje]] || [[word:lofareshe|lofareshe]] || [[word:lofareke|lofareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lofarothotho|lofarothotho]] || [[word:lofarojojo|lofarojojo]] || [[word:lofaroshosho|lofaroshosho]] || [[word:lofarokoko|lofarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lofarotho|lofarotho]] || [[word:lofarojo|lofarojo]] || [[word:lofarosho|lofarosho]] || [[word:lofaroko|lofaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lofarofthof|lofarofthof]] || [[word:lofarofjof|lofarofjof]] || [[word:lofarofshof|lofarofshof]] || [[word:lofarofkof|lofarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lofarÃŸfthÃŸf|lofarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lofarÃŸfjÃŸf|lofarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lofarÃŸfshÃŸf|lofarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lofarÃŸfkÃŸf|lofarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lofarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|lofarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lofarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|lofarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lofarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|lofarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lofarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|lofarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lofarÃŸfthÃŸf|lofarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lofarÃŸfjÃŸf|lofarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lofarÃŸfshÃŸf|lofarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lofarÃŸfkÃŸf|lofarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lofarÃŸfthÃŸf|lofarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lofarÃŸfjÃŸf|lofarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lofarÃŸfshÃŸf|lofarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lofarÃŸfkÃŸf|lofarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lofarÃḊthÃḊ|lofarÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:lofarÃḊjÃḊ|lofarÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:lofarÃḊshÃḊ|lofarÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:lofarÃḊkÃḊ|lofarÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lofarathatha|lofarathatha]] || [[word:lofarajaja|lofarajaja]] || [[word:lofarashasha|lofarashasha]] || [[word:lofarakaka|lofarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lofaratha|lofaratha]] || [[word:lofaraja|lofaraja]] || [[word:lofarasha|lofarasha]] || [[word:lofaraka|lofaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lofarafthaf|lofarafthaf]] || [[word:lofarafjaf|lofarafjaf]] || [[word:lofarafshaf|lofarafshaf]] || [[word:lofarafkaf|lofarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lofarasha|lofarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lofarshÃḋasha|lofarshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lofarroasha|lofarroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lofarmuasha|lofarmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lofaryaasha|lofaryaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golofarnkshÃḋasha|golofarnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golofarnkroasha|golofarnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golofarnkmuasha|golofarnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golofarnkyaasha|golofarnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lofafarasha|lofafarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lofafarshÃḋasha|lofafarshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lofafarroasha|lofafarroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lofafarmuasha|lofafarmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lofafaryaasha|lofafaryaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golofafarnkshÃḋasha|golofafarnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golofafarnkroasha|golofafarnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golofafarnkmuasha|golofafarnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golofafarnkyaasha|golofafarnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lefÃḊrasha|lefÃḊrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lefÃḊrshÃḋasha|lefÃḊrshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lefÃḊrroasha|lefÃḊrroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lefÃḊrmuasha|lefÃḊrmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lefÃḊryaasha|lefÃḊryaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golefÃḊrnkshÃḋasha|golefÃḊrnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golefÃḊrnkroasha|golefÃḊrnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golefÃḊrnkmuasha|golefÃḊrnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golefÃḊrnkyaasha|golefÃḊrnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:loffarasha|loffarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:loffarshÃḋasha|loffarshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loffarroasha|loffarroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loffarmuasha|loffarmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:loffaryaasha|loffaryaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloffarnkshÃḋasha|goloffarnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloffarnkroasha|goloffarnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloffarnkmuasha|goloffarnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloffarnkyaasha|goloffarnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
